\begin{align*}
k_{mp} &= \frac{\sigma_{mp}}{\Delta P_m} = \frac{\sigma(\varepsilon_{st})}{\Delta P_m} \\
\int_0^{\varepsilon_{st}} a(\varepsilon) d\varepsilon &= 2 \int_0^{\varepsilon_{st}} a(\varepsilon) \varepsilon d\varepsilon \\
a(\varepsilon) &= \sqrt{\frac{1}{\rho} \frac{d\sigma}{d\varepsilon}} \\
\sigma(\varepsilon_{st}) &= \Delta P_m \\
k_a &= k_b
\end{align*}
